title: Removing Item from Board when linked Column is updated
excerpt: I have a main Board with Tender Opportunities. I have created a second board with opportunities that are just for review, these are connected fine and when an item meets a certain criteria it goes to that board. Now I ne…

posts.author: Berry (Jodie)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a main Board with Tender Opportunities. I have created a second board with opportunities that are just for review, these are connected fine and when an item meets a certain criteria it goes to that board. Now I need to remove that item after it has been reviewed from the second board but have it remain in the first board. I can’t seem to figure out how to do this as you can’t set automations with mirrored columns.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Berry

You didn’t give any details on the conditions to be met to delete the second board item. But if you only need to trigger on a mirrored status column, you could use this recipe to set the value on a standard status column which could then be used to trigger the delete (it works with mirrored status columns):

image574×548 18 KB

If that will not work for your use case, please give more details.

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: Berry (Jodie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2024-11-20 at 8.45.47 AM1580×521 60.6 KB

So this is my secondary board and I want to delete the item from this board when “Bid” is selected in the Bid Selection column (this is a mirrored column). It should remain in my first board it is mirrored with. Hope that make things clearer. I am only a week or two into using Monday so still learning.
